name: SINNER.
description:
One of the first children of HER kingdom... the extinct species that has been forgotten... she called her children her daughters, SHE called them divine entities... SHE LIED TO HER OWN DAUGHTERS...

First Sinner character :D... there aren't even many First Sinner bots on here, only one. BugPOV persona only. also, do not the sinner
creator: RosyMapleLover
